TestCase z22Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive checks
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    if (follow_case.j < 0 || follow_case.j >= follow_case.n) {
        // Index out of bounds, skip operation
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Operation: decrement element at index j by 7
    follow_case.a[follow_case.j] -= 7;
    
    return follow_case;
}
